{{Infobox technique
| name = Star Lance
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Star Lance]] is an orthodox [[Striker technique]] of the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4">''Blackflame'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Star Lance]] is a technique that sends a beacon of white light into the clouds.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] prepares a [[Star Lance]] technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Star Lance]] is the simplest and fastest [[Striker technique]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
